llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: GDF/BF - Digital Pricing Expert (m/f/d)
job.description: Digital Pricing – Senior Technical Expert Digital Pricng Role specific activities (what is expected of you as an employee) Technical support contact for our Salesforce integrated Configure-Price-Quote (CPQ) Pricing Framework (based on PROS software) combining deep technical expertise with a strategic view on architecture, development, administration, and integration Shape the further development of our CPQ Pricing Framework and ensure a stable, scalable, and future‑proof platform Support upcoming SAP R/3 and SAP S/4HANA ERP integrations Required (Education, Additional Qualifications and experience) Bachelor’s or master’s degree in Computer science, Software Engineering or comparable from an accredited college or university is required Minimum 3+ years’ experience in working with Salesforce Experience in agile Software development Passion for working in a team Analytical capabilities Experiences in working in global / virtual teams/projects An entrepreneurial spirit and the ability to foster a positive and energized culture Excellent judgement. Able to weigh several and often conflicting constraints and make rapid, logical decisions in a fast-moving team. A growth mindset with a curiosity to learn and improve. Experiences in working in global / virtual teams/projects Technical skills: Extensive knowledge of SAP R/3 or SAP S/4HANA ERP Strong understanding of eCommerce platforms and processes Proficiency in Salesforce SalesCloud Configuration Nice to have (Education, Additional Qualifications and experience) Experience in quoting solutions (CPQ) preferred Programmatical Know-how about Salesforce (e.g. Apex etc.) Test automation Knowledge of application lifecycle, change/release management process Ability to work efficiently under pressure on non-routine and highly complex tasks. Ability to work in a multicultural team spread across the globe.
